reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content:
[한달리뷰]

한달동안 하루도 빠짐없이 계속 급여를 했는데 슈리가 정말 오메가3를 먹은 이후로 털이 부드러워지고 털이 좀 빵빵해진 느낌이 있어요! 그리고 이젠 필포켓이나 사료랑 안줘도 별도로 급여해도 너무 잘먹어서 슈리 식사 필수템이 되었어요! 그리고 병원을 거의 안가요.. 면역력이 좋아진거 아닐까 싶어요
오메가 3 같은 영양제는 눈에 확 띄는 효과보단 꾸준하게 급여하면 점차적으로 차이가 보입니다 진짜 만족하고 있어요!
슈리처럼 흰모색인 강쥐들 진짜 안심하고 먹여도 털 붉은색으로 알약 터져서 세수해야하는 불상사 없어서..진짜 넘넘 좋아요!
강추합니다🩷

_______________________________ 


운이좋게 체험단 이벤트에 당첨되어 좋은 오메가 3를 급여할 수 있었답니다:)

저는 어떠한것 보다 가장 중요한건 기호성이라고 생각합니다. 아무리 좋은 거여도 강아지가 먹지 않으면 소용이 없고 서로 먹이려고 하다보면 강아지도 저희도 쉽지 않잖아요!

저희 강아지 슈리는 올해로 두살추정의 3.5 kg의 푸숑입니다!
영양제 다양하게 급여를 해봤는데 정착을 못했는데 해결되었어요!

급여 후 정말 마음에 들었던 부분

✅ 소형견도 먹기 편한 사이즈의 오메가3에요
캡슐 사이즈가 8mm*13mm여서 목에 걸릴 일도 없어서 좋아요! 타사제품 먹고 목에 걸려서 놀란적이 있는데 그런 걱정 없이 잘먹어서 좋았어요!

✅저희 강아지가 흰색인데 오메가3 대부분 붉은색이어서…
먹고나면 입주변 붉게되서 정말 먹이기가 쉽지 않더라구요!
세수를 시킬 걱정이 사라져서 좋았습니다!

✅특유의 어취도 2번 공정을 통해 줄어서 거부감도 줄어들어 더 편히 급여할 수 있었어요! 슈리가 타사제품 먹다가 뱉더라구요ㅠ
요건 없어서 슈리한테도 잘맞은거 같아요!

급여를 했던 방법

✅ 사료 급여시 같이 급여를 한 방법
슈리는 1일 1개씩 주었기 때문에 저녁 사료에 넣어서 급여했는데 하나씩 꺼내서 편히 줄수 있어 따로 측정하지 않아 편했어요!

✅필포켓이라는 알약을 편히 먹을 수 있게 만든 황태/명태 츄와
함께 급여하니까 간식처럼 먹더라구요! 캡슐이 작아서 쏙 들어가더라구요! 요방법도 좋았습니다!

좋은 재료를 쓰고 해서 그런지 일주일정도 급여를 해보니 피부가 좋아져서 윤기가 나는 느낌이더라구요!
오메가 3은 정말 강아지에게 필수템이라고 생각해요!
다들 오메가 3먹고 아프지말고 건강하자!
reviews.content_en:
[One Month Review]

I've been giving it to Shuri every single day for a month, and after taking omega-3, her fur has become so soft and fluffy! Now she eats it so well on its own that it's become an essential part of Shuri's meals, even without mixing it with other foods or treats. And we barely go to the vet anymore... I think her immunity has improved!

With supplements like omega-3, you don't see dramatic results right away, but with consistent use, you gradually notice the difference. I'm really satisfied!

For white-colored pups like Shuri, I'm so relieved that there's no mishap where the pill breaks and stains her fur red, requiring a wash. It's seriously the best! 🩷 Highly recommend!

---

I was lucky enough to win a tester event and got to give Shuri a good quality omega-3! :)

I think the most important thing above all else is palatability. No matter how good a product is, if your dog won't eat it, it's useless. And trying to get your dog to eat something becomes stressful for both of you!

Our pup Shuri is estimated to be 2 years old and weighs 3.5kg—she's a Poodle mix!
I've tried various supplements, but none of them stuck... until this one fixed the problem!

Things I really loved after giving it:

✅ It's omega-3 in a size that's easy for small dogs to eat
The capsule size is 8mm x 13mm, so there's no risk of it getting stuck in her throat. I've had other products get stuck before and it was scary, but she eats this without any worries!

✅ Our pup is white, but most omega-3s are red...
After eating them, the area around her mouth gets red, making it really hard to give. I'm so relieved I don't have to worry about washing her!

✅ The fishy smell is reduced through a 2-step process, so there's less resistance and it's easier to give. Shuri actually spit out other brand products ㅠ
She seems to really like this one!

How I gave it:

✅ Method of giving it together with regular meals
Since Shuri gets 1 piece per day, I put it in her evening food, and since I can take them out one by one, I don't have to measure separately—it's convenient!

✅ Giving it together with PILL POCKET (a treat that makes it easy to take pills) made of dried pollack/cod, and she ate it like a snack! The capsule is small so it fits right in. This method was great too!

Since good ingredients are used, after about a week of giving it, I noticed her skin improved and her coat got shinier!
I really think omega-3 is essential for dogs!
Everyone, take your omega-3 and stay healthy!

처음 먹을땐 혼자 삼키는게 어려워서 입에 넣어줬는데 요즘은 사료에 같이 주면 알아서 잘 먹어요~~
모질이 좀  부드러워지고 더 생기넘치는건 기분탓인지  모르겠지만 아이가 좀더 건강해졌답니다.
일단 거부감없이 잘 먹으니 꾸준히 먹여봐야겠어요~~♡



체험단 선정되어 구매 후 오늘 받았어요.
일단 유통기한은 길고 타원형의 무취의 알약형태에요. 맨질맨질한 외형으로 손위에 올려두니 관심을 보이고 물고는 가는데 냄새가 없으니 삼키지는 않아요. 목구멍에 밀어넣어 먹였는데 작고 타원형에 맨질거리니 불편함 없이 쏙 넘어갔어요. 하리는 눈물이 많은데 눈건강에도 좋다고 하니 기대하며 먹여보아요.
reviews.content_en:
[One Month Later Review]
At first, she had trouble swallowing on her own, so I put it in her mouth, but these days when I give it with her regular food, she eats it on her own~~
Her coat became a bit softer and seems more vibrant, though it might just be my imagination, but my pup has become healthier.
Since she eats it without resistance, I'll keep giving it consistently~~♡

---

I was selected as a tester and received it today after purchasing.
First, the expiration date is long, and it's an oval, odorless pill form. When I placed it on my hand with a smooth exterior, she showed interest and picked it up but didn't swallow it since there's no smell. I pushed it down her throat to give it to her, and since it's small, oval, and smooth, it went down without any trouble. My pup tends to have a lot of eye tears, and since it's said to be good for eye health, I'll keep giving it with anticipation.

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
[한달리뷰]
☆찐 한달리뷰가 왔어요~☆
무조건 급여해야하는 기본 영양제가 모다? 
바로 오메가3!
한달간 매일 사료와 함께 먹여봤어요~☆

아이 몸무게가있어 번갈아서 아침저녁 각각1알씩, 담날은 저녁1알~ 이렇게 2일에 3알먹였어요.
원래 다른 오메가3를 매일 2알로 꾸준히먹였었는데, 바잇미가 1캡슐당 고함량이라 먹던 양을 줄인거죠. 이거 생각하니 바잇미가 가성비갑!!! 게다가 이건 개별포장♡

일단 알이 작아서 남긴 적이 없구요.
피부가 워낙 안좋아 배에 피부병자국이 심하게 있고, 개털이던 유기견 출신 아가라 오메가3  바꾸기 조심스러웠어요. 의사쌤도 애피부 완전 예민해서 조심해야겠어요 라고 하셨거든요.
그래도 바잇미 믿고 바꿨는데, 역시! 

일단, 등의 각질이 사라졌어요. 덕분에 등에 바르던 로션의 주기가 늘었어요. 그리고 털도 부드럽고 실크빛이 진하게 보여요. 산책하다 다른 견주분이 뭐먹이냐 물어볼정도로요. 바꾼건 오메가3밖에 없거든요. 응가상태좋은건 덤!

예전에 첫째 키울때, 오메가3로 수치개선의 드라마틱한 효과를 본 편이라 애 입양하자마자 오메가3를 꾸준히 먹이고 있어요. 아직 둘째는 아가라 혈검변화는 알 수 없지만, 첫째 때 경험으로 오메가3의 힘을 믿거든요.

고순도고함량에, 인증원료, 개별포장, 먹기편한 작은 사이즈, 합리적인가격까지. 좋은 제품 감사해요! 

♡~♡~♡~♡~♡~이전리뷰~♡~♡~♡~♡~
얼마전에 영양제 설문을 하더니. 결국은 견주들 마음을 쏘옥 읽은 제품이 나왔네요. 👏👏👏

  🌟고순도 고함량, 흡수율이 높은 'rTG', 산패위험도가 가장 낮아 안전한 '초임계공법', 인증받은 'IPOS 5 스타 원료', '정제어유', 중금속 걱정X, 보관에 적합한 '낱개포장','작은 캡슐' 사이즈🌟

=>한마디로 좋은 원료를, 안전하게 처리한데다 흡수율도 높였고, 산패걱정없는 낱개포장까지~ㅜㅜ진짜 견주들 맘을 어찌이리도 쏘옥 캐치하셨는지!!!
  
   오메가3가 단순히 실크같은 털뿐만아니라 염증, 관절, 혈액순환, 피부, 면역, 두뇌 등등...진짜 여기저기 좋잖아요.😃 그래서 지금도 매일 먹이고있는데, 바잇미 함량이 더 높아 바잇미꺼 재구매 하려구요:)

  오메가3는 산패문제때문에 캡슐형태가 좋다고 하잖아요. 그런데 애들 알큰거 안 삼키잖아요.  다행히 바잇미는 캡슐 사이즈가 웬만한 건사료보다 작아요.
  애 밥줄때 사료 위에 캡슐 그대로 얹어줬는데, 다행히 사료먹을 때 같이 호로록 호로록~☺️ 

   혹시 예술적으로 캡슐만 톡~ 뱉는다? 가위로 잘라서 사료에 넣어주심 돼요. 향에 민감한 경우에도 향미료가 안들어있다고하니 도전해보셔도될거같아요~
reviews.content_en:
[One Month Review]
☆A genuine one-month review has arrived~☆
What's the basic supplement you must give your dog?
It's omega-3!
I gave it with her regular food every day for a month~☆

Since my pup has a certain weight, I alternated—one in the morning, one in the evening, then just one in the evening the next day—so 3 pills in 2 days.
I was consistently giving 2 pills daily of a different omega-3 brand before, but since BITE ME has high content per capsule, I reduced the amount. When I think about this, BITE ME is a total value for money!!! Plus it comes in individual packages♡

First, since the pills are small, she never leaves any.
Her skin is so bad that she has severe skin disease marks on her belly, and since she's a former shelter dog with really coarse fur, I was cautious about switching omega-3. The vet also said her skin was very sensitive and I'd need to be careful.
But I trusted BITE ME and switched, and indeed!

First, the flakiness on her back disappeared. Thanks to that, the frequency of applying lotion on her back has decreased. And her coat is soft and has a deep silky shine. Other dog owners even ask me what I'm feeding her during walks. The only thing I changed was the omega-3. And as a bonus, her digestion improved!

When I raised my first dog, I saw dramatic results improving her numbers with omega-3, so I started consistently giving it right after adopting this one. Since my second pup is still young, I can't see blood test changes yet, but based on my experience with my first dog, I trust the power of omega-3.

High purity, high content, certified ingredients, individual packaging, convenient small size, and reasonable price. Thank you for a great product!

♡~♡~♡~♡~♡~Previous Review~♡~♡~♡~♡~
I filled out a supplement survey recently, and in the end, a product that perfectly captured the hearts of dog owners came out. 👏👏👏

🌟High purity, high content, highly absorbable 'rTG', 'supercritical extraction method' with the lowest rancidity risk for safety, 'IFOS 5-star certified' ingredients, 'refined fish oil', no heavy metal concerns, 'individual packaging' suitable for storage, 'small capsule size'🌟

=>In short, good ingredients processed safely with improved absorption and individual packaging to prevent rancidity~ㅜㅜ I'm amazed at how well they understood dog owners' hearts!!!

Omega-3 isn't just for silky fur—it's good for inflammation, joints, blood circulation, skin, immunity, brain, and so much more...😃 So I'm still giving it daily, and since BITE ME has higher content, I plan to rebuy BITE ME :)

Omega-3 is best in capsule form because of rancidity concerns. But dogs don't swallow big pills, right? Thankfully, BITE ME's capsule size is smaller than most kibble.
When I give my pup her meal, I just put the capsule on top of the kibble, and fortunately she gobbles it right up with her food ☺️

What if your dog artfully spits out just the capsule? You can cut it with scissors and mix it into the food. For cases sensitive to smell, since there's no added flavor, you could try it too~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
[한달리뷰]
사실 저희 아이들은 한달이 아닌 보름동안 먹은 리뷰겠네요
(두 마리다 보니)
일단 첫 번째로 날씨만 추워지면 아이들 배에 각질이 어마무시해서 크림도 바르고 미스트를 아무리 뿌려도 안됐는데 오메가3를 먹고 배가 다시 맨들맨들 해졌어요
((그래서인지 털 엉킴도 확연히 줄어들었구요!))
그리고 둘 째는 늘 귀에 염증을 달고 살았는데 오메가3 급여 후에는 아무리 이어클리너 좋다는 걸 써도 낫지 않던 귀 염증이
싹 가라앉아서 너무 신기했어요 유산균도 거의 다 먹어가는데
같이 구매해야겠네요 :) 정말 추천해요!

올 해로 아이들이 7살 노령견으로 접어들어 점점 영양제에 관심을 많이 갖게 되었는데, 어떤 영양제를 먹여야 하나 고민하던 찰나에 이전에 타사에서 받았던 오메가3를 찾아보다가 바잇미에서 오메가3가 나왔다는 이야기에 득달같이 달려왔어요
특히나 오메가3는 사람에게도 좋은 영양제인만큼 피부/모질,심장,관절,면역,염증까지 꼭 챙겨먹여야하는 영양제니까 무조건 먹여야 겠다는 생각이 들더라구요
이전에 오메가3를 먹일때는 알약이 너무 커서 밥을 먹이면 약만 뻬고 남기거나 잘라줘도 입부근에 오메가3의 오일 냄새가 너무 많이 났는데 알약 사이즈가 작아서인지 밥이랑 잘 삼켜서 너무 좋았어요 :)
아! 그리고 제가 제 영양제를 찾아 보다 알게 된 사실인데
영양제는 개별포장이 정말 중요하더라구요 개별 포장이 아니면 약의 성분이 파괴될 수도 있다고 하던데 오메가3가 꼼꼼히 개별포장 되어있는 점도 너무 좋았어요♥
강아지 오메가3로 완전 추천합니다
reviews.content_en:
[One Month Review]
Actually, my two pups have only been eating it for two weeks, not a month
(since there are two of them)
First of all, whenever the weather gets cold, my pups' bellies get incredibly flaky, and no matter how much cream I apply or spray mist, nothing worked. But after omega-3, their bellies became smooth again
((And because of that, their coat tangles reduced significantly!))
And the second one always had ear inflammation, but after giving omega-3, the ear inflammation that wouldn't heal even with the best ear cleaners just completely cleared up—it was so amazing!
I'm almost done with probiotics too, so I need to buy more :) I really recommend it!

As the dogs are entering their senior years at 7 years old this year, I've become more interested in supplements. I was wondering which supplements to give when I was looking into an omega-3 I had received from another brand before, and when I heard BITE ME came out with omega-3, I ran right over
Especially since omega-3 is good for people too, I realized that skin/coat, heart, joints, immunity, and inflammation relief are all supplements you must give, so I decided I absolutely had to give it
When I was giving omega-3 before, the pills were so big that when I gave it with food, she'd leave just the pill or even if I cut it, there was such a strong fishy smell around her mouth. But since the pill size is small, she swallows it well with her food—it's so great! :)
Oh! And this is something I learned while looking for my own supplements:
individual packaging for supplements is really important. I heard that without individual packaging, the supplement's components can be destroyed, and I was so pleased that omega-3 is carefully individually packaged♥
I completely recommend BITE ME's dog omega-3

reviews.content_en:
[One Month Review]
BITE ME Omega 3 and other supplements are always on top of my dog's food bowl. Honestly, since supplements are just supplementary products, I don't expect dramatic results. I give them with the hope that my dog won't get worse than now, so as long as Songi eats well and has no allergies or other issues, that's good enough for me.
I was worried about the anesthesia Songi had a month ago for her health checkup, dental checkup, and scaling, but thanks to BITE ME Omega 3 and the supplements, she's recovering healthily. As long as she's not in pain, that's the best. Of course, she eats well, poops well, sleeps well, and just lives like that 😍😍

————————————————————————

I was so happy to be selected for the Omega 3 experience team to take care of my pups' health, and I was so grateful that they even did a launch event and got such a great product at a good price!

reviews.name: 변****
reviews.content:
[한달리뷰]
매일 저녁 밥시간에 4알씩 먹었어요^^
한달 안되게 먹었는데도 피부트러블 없이 핑크빛 속살과 엄청 윤기 좌르르한 쵸쵸의 털 🥹🥹🥹
만질때마다 부들부들 해서 효과 너무 좋아요^^

그리고 먹이기 편한 간편함!
톡톡 눌러서 까기만하면되니까 깔끔하고 산폐 걱정 안해도되서 좋았어요^^
또 냄새나 이런게 없어서 거부감없이 사료와 함께 순삭해서 좋았답니다^^

-----‐‐----------‐--------‐--------------------------------------------
작년에는 펌프타입의 오메가3를 먹이면서 털의 윤기가 좌르르르 하고 피부도 트러블없이 괜찮아서 꾸준히 먹었어요.
단지 펌프타입이라 자꾸 흘러서 관리하기 힘들었는데 이건 알약형식이라 깔끔하니 좋습니다
펌프타입은 정확한 용량 맞추기도 애매했으나 요건 몸무개에따른 알약 수 만큼만 주면되서 편해요^^
쵸쵸는 몸무게가 15키로대라 4알 급여하고있습니다.
여행다닐때 필요한 만큼만 챙겨서 갈 수 있어서 부피도 많이 차지하지않아 빼먹지 않고 먹일 수 있을거 같아요~^^

알약은 처음이라 안먹을까마 조마조마했는데 아무런거부감 없이 먹어서 좋아요^^
꾸준히 먹일 수 있을거 같아요~
reviews.content_en:
[One Month Review]
I gave her 4 pills every evening at mealtime ^^
Even after less than a month of taking it, Chocho's coat has the most gorgeous sheen with no skin troubles and beautiful pink inner fur 🥹🥹🥹
Her fur feels so soft every time I touch it, the effect is amazing ^^

And it's so convenient to give!
You just pop the capsules out and you're done—it's clean and you don't have to worry about oxidation ^^
There's no smell or anything, so she gobbles it right up with her food without any fussiness ^^

————————————————————————

Last year I gave her a pump-type Omega 3 and her coat had that gorgeous sheen and her skin was fine without any troubles, so I kept giving it to her consistently.
The only thing was that the pump type kept leaking, so it was hard to manage, but this pill form is much cleaner, which I love.
With the pump type, it was hard to measure the exact dose, but with this you just give the right number of pills based on body weight, so it's way easier ^^
Chocho weighs around 15kg, so I'm giving her 4 pills.
When we travel, I can just pack exactly what we need, so it doesn't take up much space and I won't forget to give it to her ~^^

Since it's my first time with pills, I was worried she might not eat them, but she takes them without any hesitation, which is great ^^
I think I'll be able to keep giving it to her consistently ~

reviews.name: 곽****
reviews.content:
[한달리뷰]
현재 꾸준히 먹이고 있는 중이고, 알러지가 있는 아이인데
성분에 특별한 반응이 없습니다! 알약이 작아서 밥에 섞어주면 
있는지고 모른채로 호다닥 먹습니다 ㅋㅋ
어쩌다 터지면 새로운 냄새때문에 그런지 잘근잘근 씹더라구여
캡슐 하나당 포장되어있어서 가지고 나가도 걱정이 없습니다😉
오메가3 제품전에도 사전설문도 하시고 보호자들이 어떤 걸 원하는지 파악이 잘 된 제품인거같아요!
————————————————————————-

항상 오메가3는 필수로 먹이는 영양제입니다🤗
저는 영양제 고민때문에 동물학 대학교수님께서 하는 강아지영양제 세미나도 다녀왔습니다 ㅋㅋ 무궁무진한데 도데체 어떤걸 먹여야 할까 싶어서 🥹 그중 제외한건 간식형태와 성분이 제대로 적혀있지않는건 거르는중입니다 특히 오메가3믄 산패우려되는 거는 걸러내면 진짜 알약형태 밖에 안남아요 ㅠ 해서 고르고골라 닥터레이,벳액티브오메가를 주로 먹여왔는데

reviews.content_en:
[One Month Review] I'm giving BITE ME Doctor Essential rTG Omega 3 with food every morning. My pup's skin and coat look healthy and soft. I trust BITE ME Omega 3 with my pup's health every day hehe

When I heard the BITE ME Omega 3 launch news, I bought it at a good price. Since I'm continuously giving Omega 3, and it's made with quality ingredients, I bought 3 boxes.
My pup eats it well so I think it'll be a repurchase item ^^

————————————————————————

[One Month Review]
I literally gave it every single day without missing a day!
I have 2 pups and both of them had the best poop quality.
I applied for the experience team because I was worried about their skin, coat, and immunity,
and every time I pet them, they felt softer than before, which was great.
For immunity, both of them stayed so healthy without any minor illnesses ^.^
My pups just chew and eat it right up when I give it to them ♥ Must taste good hehe

————————————————————————

Choosing a good dog Omega 3 is simple—you can check about 6 things.
I checked if [Doctor Essential rTG Omega 3] from the BITE ME Secret experience team meets these 6 conditions :)

1. Extraction Method Check
- ★Low Temperature Supercritical Extraction★
Omega 3 is sensitive to heat, so extracting at high temperatures increases the risk of oxidation. Oxidized Omega 3 has a strong fishy smell and reduced effectiveness, which can actually harm health.
That's why it's best to choose products extracted with low-temperature extraction, like [Low Temperature Supercritical Extraction], which prevents thermal degradation and lowers oxidation risk.

2. Check EPA + DHA Total
- ★EPA 120mg + DHA 80mg = 200mg (per capsule)★ !!

FYI, when feeding without Omega 3-containing food, it's recommended to have EPA+DHA intake of about 75-100mg per kg of body weight. For healthy pups, up to 150mg per kg can be safely taken.

3. Purity Check
- ★80% purity★ Omega 3 oil
(According to product info, actual measured EPA and DHA purity is 88% or higher)

4. Check Raw Materials and Certification Marks
- ★Small fish species★ used (no concerns about radiation/heavy metals)
- ★French Polaris Premium Raw Materials★
- ★IFOS 5-STAR Certification★

5. Form Check
- ★rTG Form★: Omega 3 can be categorized as TG, EE, or rTG forms depending on structure. Recently, rTG form is most preferred.
The reason is that it addresses the shortcomings of TG and EE forms, resulting in higher absorption rate, purity, and bioavailability.

6. Product Packaging Method Check
- ★Soft Capsules & Individual PTP Packaging★
(※ PTP: Short for 'Press Through Package'—a plastic sheet heat-formed to create space for the pill and sealed with thin aluminum)
: Since Omega 3 quality easily changes due to light and oxygen, it's best to minimize air contact/exposure during distribution and storage.
Products packaged in bottles or pump forms can lose quality from oxygen exposure during opening and closing.
I recommend individually sealed products that minimize air contact.

★Overall Rating★
- I've been giving Omega 3 consistently because of its good effects on immunity and coat/skin improvement. Previously, I was giving my pups bulk-packaged Omega 3. At first, the Omega 3 capsules looked transparent and clean, but over time the capsule color became cloudy... I felt like oxidation was happening, and I was anxious about whether to keep giving it.
- BITE ME Doctor Essential rTG Omega 3's individual packaging is the best part ♥♥ No oxidation risk, easy to carry, and hygenic.
- I had the impression that rTG forms are expensive, but BITE ME Doctor Essential rTG Omega 3 is very reasonably priced. It's 35,000 won for 60 capsules :)
- Each PTP pack has 10 capsules bundled together with the expiration date written on top, so it's convenient to check. You don't have to bother checking the box ^.^
- The capsule size is 1.3cm—not too big, not too small, a medium size. I tried giving my pup 1 capsule plain (?) and amazingly she ate it well. She chewed and ate it right up ^_^
- Since my pups are medium-sized dogs, I give them 2 pills a day mixed with food. They say that high-concentration, high-purity Omega 3 can cause loose stools when first given, but since my pups have been taking Omega 3 continuously, their stool quality has been great.

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
[한달리뷰]
저 진짜 하루도 빠짐없이 매일 급여했거든요!
댕댕이 2마리인데 둘 다 응가 상태도 너무 좋았구요. 
피부 모질이랑 면역력이 걱정이어서 체험단 신청한 거였는데, 
쓰담 쓰담할 때마다 전보다 부드러워진 느낌이라 좋았어요.
면역력 부분에서도 잔병 하나 없이 둘 다 넘나 건강^.^
저희 댕댕이들은 그냥 줘도 잘 씹어 먹습니당♥ 맛있나봐용ㅎㅎ

------------------

좋은 강아지 오메가3를 고르는 방법은 
간단하게 6가지 정도로 확인할 수 있는데요.
바잇미 시크릿 체험단으로 체험해 본 [닥터에센셜 rTG 오메가3]도 이 6가지 조건에 적합한지 알아봤습니다 :)

​
1. 추출법 확인 
- ★저온 초임계 공법★
열에 약한 오메가3는 고온에서 추출할 경우, 산패할 가능성이 높아요. 이렇게 산패한 오메가3는 비릿한 냄새가 강하고, 효과는 떨어지기 때문에 오히려 건강을 해칠 수 있어요. 
그렇기 때문에 저온 추출로 열변형이 없고, 산패 위험을 낮춘 대표적인 추출법인 [저온 초임계 공법]으로 추출한 제품을 고르는 것이 좋습니다.

2. EPA + DHA 합 확인 
- ★EPA 120mg + DHA 80mg = (1캡슐당) 200mg★ !!

참고로, 오메가3가 함유되지 않은 사료 급여 시 체중 1kg 당 EPA+DHA 섭취량을 75~100mg 정도로 권장하고 있는데요. 건강한 아이의 경우 1kg 당 150mg까지 무리없이 복용이 가능하다고 해요.

3. 순도 확인 
- ★순도 80%★ 오메가3 오일
(제품 정보에 나와있는 거 보니 실제 측정된 EPA와 DHA 순도는 88% 이상이라고 하네요)

4. 원료 및 인증 마크 확인 
- ★소형 어종★ 사용 (방사능/중금속 걱정X)
- ★프랑스 Polaris 프리미엄 원료★
- ★IFOS 5-STAR 인증★

5. 형태 확인
- ★rTG형★ : 오메가3는 구조에 따라 TG형, EE형, rTG형으로 구분할 수 있는데요. 최근에는 rTG형을 가장 선호한다고 해요.
그 이유는 TG형과 EE형의 단점을 보완하여 흡수율과 순도, 생체이용률이 모두 높기 때문이에요.  
 
6. 제품 포장 방법 확인
- ★연질캡슐 & PTP 개별 포장★
(※ PTP : 'Press Through Package’의 약자로 플라스틱 시트를 열로 성형해 약이 들어가는 공간을 만들고 그 위를 얇은 알루미늄으로 감싸 밀봉한 것)
 : 오메가3는 빛과 산소에 의해서도 품질이 쉽게 변하기 때문에 유통과 보관 과정에서 공기에 최대한 접촉/노출되지 않는 것이 좋아요. 
병이나 펌프형으로 포장된 제품은 열고 닫는 과정에서 산소와 만나 품질이 저하될 수 있어요. 
개별 밀봉 포장하여 공기와의 접촉을 최대한 줄인 제품을 추천합니다.

★총 평★
- 오메가3는 면역력, 피모와 피부 개선 등 효과가 좋으니 꾸준히 먹이고 있었거든요. 기존에는 저희 댕댕이들에게 벌크 포장된 오메가3를 먹여왔어요. 처음엔 오메가3 캡슐이 투명하고 깨끗해보였는데 시간이 지날수록 캡슐 색이 혼탁해진다고 해야 하나..? 산패가 되고 있는 느낌적인 느낌을 받았고 계속 먹여도 될지 불안하더라고요. 
- 바잇미 닥터에센셜 rTG 오메가3는 개별 포장되어 있는 점이 가장 좋았어요♥♥ 산패 위험도 없고 휴대하기도 좋고 위생적이니까요.
- rTG형은 가격이 비싸다는 인식이 있었는데,  바잇미 닥터에센셜 rTG 오메가3는 가격이 매우 합리적이더라고요. 60캡슐에 35,000원이니까요 :)
- PTP 10개가 한 묶음이고 묶음마다 위에 유통기한이 적혀 있어서 유통기한 확인하기도 편리하더라구요. 번거롭게 상자 확인하지 않아도 되고 ^.^
- 캡슐 사이즈는 1.3cm로 그리 크지도, 작지도 않은 중간 사이즈였어요. 저희 댕댕이에게 생으로(?) 1알 줘봤는데 신기하게 아주 잘 먹더라구요.  잘근잘근 씹어 먹더라는^_^
- 저희 댕댕이들은 중형견이라 하루 2알씩 사료에 섞어서 챙겨주고 있답니다. 고농축 고순도 오메가3를 처음 먹일 때 변이 무를 수 있다고 하는데, 저희 댕댕이들은 오메가3를 계속 먹어와서 그런 건지 변 상태도 아주 좋았습니다.

I fed this for a month and saw real results - here's my honest review zz
The best thing about giving my pup BITE ME Doctor Essential rTG Omega-3 for a month was how incredibly easy feeding is!! 🐶
Just like in the photo, I simply sprinkle it on top of the kibble and my dog gulps it right down.
Before this, I was using the liquid version, which was such a hassle - measuring out the dose and pouring it on the food, worrying about spilling and it getting slippery, plus having to keep it refrigerated all the time.
My pup is super picky about smells and won't even look at something if she sniffs it and doesn't like it, but this BITE ME omega-3 has no fishy smell at all!

As for the effects of omega-3 - what more can I say!! My pup's coat seems even better since taking BITE ME omega-3. The groomer even complimented how healthy her fur and skin look with no issues at all.
For first-time dog owners, I'd really urge you to definitely give your pup omega-3, no matter what else you do.
If you read my previous reviews, you'll see I really saw amazing results, which is why I'm leaving this one-month review.
There are lots of other omega-3s out there, but omega-3s are prone to rancidity, which is a concern. That's why I highly recommend BITE ME Doctor Essential rTG Omega-3 with its individual capsule packaging!!!

I've always felt how important omega-3 is and have been consistently giving it to my pup. When BITE ME, my go-to brand, not only launched their omega-3 but also gave me the opportunity to try it, I was so happy I gave it to my pup right away!
My pup is cute-looking, but she was rescued from the streets and lived in a cage before. When I first adopted her, she had two warts - one on her gums and one on her lip.
They said it was papilloma, and that omega-3 might help heal it naturally. So I gave it to her every single day without missing once, and one day it just completely disappeared!
But the omega-3 I used to give was liquid with a dropper, so I was always worried about rancidity. This new BITE ME omega-3 comes in capsule form with individual packaging, so I can give it to her without any rancidity concerns - that was really great!
As for omega-3's benefits, there's so much to say.. From now on, I plan to keep giving her BITE ME omega-3 since it's so easy to store and administer!!

🏷️ BITE ME Omega features:

reviews.content_en:
Omega-3 is a must for doggies!!
Dangeun is still a baby, but her coat is especially soft and fluffy, so she gets lots of compliments from groomers!
I think that's because of the omega-3~!

Right before finishing up the omega-3 I was using, I applied for and got to try DR ESSENTIAL rTG Omega-3!
First off, comparing it to the omega-3 I was using before, what I love most is the PTP packaging! Omega-3 tends to oxidize when exposed to air, which is a big concern for rancidity, but with rTG omega-3 there's no need to worry about that. Plus, it's super convenient to carry when traveling!
The one I used to give came in a container, so it took up a lot of space ㅠㅠ The individual packaging is easy to carry and hygienic, and since not a single capsule goes to waste when I mix it with her food, she finishes everything and I don't even have to wash her bowl ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
And maybe it's just my imagination, but her digestion seems softer than usual~! Each box comes with 60 capsules in 10-packs, and once we finish them, I think I'll buy it with my own money!

reviews.content_en: Wow, BITE ME is coming out with Omega-3 too! 😀 My pup is a medium-to-large breed and already 5 years old, so I've been actively searching and thinking hard about starting supplements from the new year. Honestly, I had really high expectations about several aspects I loved, and my only worry was whether my pup wouldn't eat it, but wow~ she eats SO well 😁 I put it on top of her food like a topping and she gobbles it up with her regular kibble. I introduced it gradually over 5 days with one piece per meal, two a day, but my pup's proper amount is 4-5 per day so I'm planning to increase it gradually. The rTG form has great bioavailability, I can feed it without worrying about radiation or heavy metals, and the soft capsule has no risk of oxidation. The individual packaging is amazing too!! The size is just right—not too small, not too big—perfect! 👍 Most importantly, my pup eats it without any resistance, so I feel like I've been freed from all that worry. I'm so happy and satisfied 🤭 Even at 4 pieces per day for my pup, one box lasts 15 days, so two boxes a month should be enough. Right after the official launch today, I immediately bought 3 boxes at 40% off!! (I'd pre-registered for notifications and got an extra 10% off too 👍 yay!)

reviews.content_en:

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:

기존에 병원서 추천받은 안티* 래피드 제품을 급여했었는데 아무래도 액상 색깔이 붉은 빛이다보니 흰색털을 가진 친구들은 잘못급여하면 색상테러+비린내까지 힘들겠다 싶었는데(저희강아지도 실버푸숑이라서 입가는 회색털이라 걱정되더라구요ㅠㅠ) 바잇미 rTG 오메가 3는 털이 물들 염려가 없어서 좋아요!
더 이전에는 펌프식으로 되어있는 오메가3오일로 급여했었는데 급여도 불편하고 펌핑 후에도 병 근처에서 비린내가 나서 보관이 힘들었어요ㅠㅠ(내새끼도 중요한데 제 코도 중요해서...) 바잇미 제품도 구멍내서 오일 향을 맡아보니 그 진하다는 펌프식 오메가3오일 못지않게 영양가를 가득 담았구나했는데 캡슐안에 튼튼하게 잘 가둬져 있어서 대만족했어요!

그리고 저는 제껀 유통기한 지나도 대충먹는데 우리 말못하는 멍멍이 친구들 먹는건 괜히 더 꼼꼼해더라구요.
각 캡슐이 들어있는 한판마다 유통기한이 적혀있어요.
저처럼 덜렁거리고 박스 홀라당 버리는 집사들에게도 안성맞춤이구요. 다른제품들처럼 한판에 한달치가 아닌 10일치씩이 있으니 어디갈때 챙기기도 쉬워요.

전체적으로 약을 먹이는 보호자도 먹는 멍뭉이들도 고려해준 좋은 제품이라 추천드립니다!
reviews.content_en:
My dog is such a picky eater that even heartworm medicine is a struggle to give her ㅜㅜ But [BITE ME Doctor Essential rTG Omega-3] turned out to be SO easy to give! First, while struggling to get my dog to eat it, I was worried the soft capsule would easily fall apart, but after dropping it a few times and rinsing it with water, it stayed sturdy with no problems. 

And just like how humans prefer rTG Omega-3 over regular Omega-3, I was so satisfied that it exists for dogs too. Previously, my vet recommended a different brand's product, but since the liquid had a reddish tint, I was concerned that for white-haired dogs, a mistake could cause staining plus fishy smell (my silver poodle has gray hair around her mouth so I was worried ㅠㅠ). But with BITE ME rTG Omega-3, there's no risk of fur staining, which is great! 

Even before that, I was using pump-type Omega-3 oil, but it was inconvenient to administer and smelled very fishy even near the bottle after pumping, making storage difficult ㅠㅠ (my pup is important, but my nose is too...). When I tested BITE ME's product by opening a hole to smell the oil, I could tell it had nutrition packed in just like that strong pump-type Omega-3 oil, but it's securely sealed inside the capsule so I was very satisfied! 

Also, I tend to eat expired things without much thought, but I find myself being more careful with things my non-verbal fur friend eats. Each capsule blister pack has an expiration date written on it. It's perfect for scatterbrained people like me who throw away entire boxes. Unlike other products where one blister is a month's supply, this comes in 10-day portions, making it easy to carry when going out. 

Overall, it's a thoughtfully made product that considers both the guardian administering the medicine and the pups eating it, so I recommend it!

Polaris raw material / low-temperature supercritical extraction method / rTG form - extracted from small fish species so no heavy metal concerns and has passed radiation testing. (Honestly, I don't scrutinize my own food this much 🤣🤣)

6 oval (1.3cm) size makes it easy for people giving pills for the first time to administer.

The purpose of giving Omega-3 varies, but the visible effect is probably fur shine. I don't always feed it regularly, but definitely when I'm giving Omega-3, her coat is soft and nice 🙂

reviews.content_en:
As an essential cat supplement, I give both omega-3 and probiotics. The omega-3 I currently give unfortunately doesn't come in individual packets, so I always felt uneasy when giving it, but BITE ME Doctor Essential rTG Omega-3 comes in safe individual packets with ingredients from Polaris France, so I can confidently give it – that's why I decided to try it.

First, it's from a world-class ingredient supplier so the quality is great, and second, it's EPA and DHA with high purity and high concentration rTG omega-3 oil. The most worrying part when giving omega-3 is radiation and heavy metal issues, but third requirement passed – it uses small fish species with low risk!

My cats' dry food is bigger than this supplement, but they magically notice supplements and open their mouths, so I put it directly in their throat. It's so small they swallow it easily, making it much easier to give. In a month or two it'll be time to buy omega-3 again, so I'm planning to think about buying BITE ME omega-3 with my own money after giving it for a month!

This was written honestly after receiving the product from BITE ME.

reviews.content_en:
BITE ME's omega-3 is finally out
Actually, I was wondering if omega-3 was really necessary for dogs and kept putting off buying it, but after researching, I found that EPA/DHA that make up omega-3 are unsaturated fatty acids essential for dogs, helping with so many things like immunity, coat health, obesity, and stress! 
Plus, lately Grim's coat has been thinning, and she suddenly started tail-biting and seemed stressed, so I was worried, but I'm planning to give this consistently :)

The 2 things I liked most about this BITE ME omega-3 are:
It comes in individual packets like human pills so it's safe from rancidity and super convenient to tear open and give.
With liquid supplements, I always felt uneasy about measuring the right amount even when trying to get the dosage right, but pill form is so much better for precise dosing 👍🏻

Also, it's my first time giving a pill-type supplement, and before I open it there's no smell at all, but Grim came over and went nom! I was worried she might spit it out if she chewed and burst it, but she crunched happily and ate it all, so I think I could just put it on her food or give it like a treat 🫶🏻
(Now I see it went through 2 deodorization processes to reduce the fishy smell!)

I think the environment where food and treats are made is really important, and I buy with that in mind, and with BITE ME omega-3, it has certifications and certificates from world-class ingredient suppliers, and most importantly, I've never been unsatisfied with any product I've bought under the BITE ME name, so it seems like a safe purchase 🐶🐶
